from fastapi import APIRouter, FastAPI

app = FastAPI()
# Correct: use a centralized router with a prefix to handle API versioning
v1_router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/v1")

@v1_router.get("/users")
def get_users():
    pass

@v1_router.get("/products")
def get_products():
    pass

app.include_router(v1_router)
